name: solivio
description: Open-source groundwork for Solivio: customer request intake, product matching, and offer generation.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @solivio/api" "npm run dev --workspace @solivio/web"
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run start --workspace @solivio/api" "npm run start --workspace @solivio/web"
